description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a light gray fabric, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design. The sofa includes three backrest cushions and two seat cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be loose rather than attached. Two decorative throw pillows, one in mustard yellow and the other in a black-and-white houndstooth pattern, add visual interest and contrast to the otherwise monochromatic palette. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and integrated into the sofa's rectangular frame, providing a boxy silhouette. The sofa stands on six slender, black metal legs that are slightly recessed, giving it a light and elevated appearance. The overall look is contemporary and versatile, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, light gray three-seater sofa with straight armrests, loose cushions, and slim black metal legs. Includes two decorative throw pillows in mustard yellow and black-and-white houndstooth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, three back cushions, two seat cushions, and both decorative pillows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the straight armrest, and the placement of the throw pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the straight armrest and the arrangement of the cushions and pillows from the opposite side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, uniform backrest cushions and two loose, uniform seat cushions; two decorative throw pillows placed asymmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, medium-height armrests integrated into the rectangular frame, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners and near the center for support; legs are straight, exposed, and slightly recessed.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, segmented backrest with three individual loose cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture; no visible decorative stitching or pattern on the main upholstery, but one throw pillow features a black-and-white houndstooth pattern.
